title: Engineer, AS
description:
**Position Overview**
**Job Title: Engineer, AS**
**Location: Pune, India**
**Role Description**
* The candidate in this role will need to develop application code, implement technical solutions, and configure applications in different environments in response to business problems.
* To meet the requirements of the business, the candidate will actively participate in application development lifecycle, investigate issues (bugs/performance), promote re\\-usability of existing components, and contribute to the creation of frameworks.
* The candidate will need to work in the team. Knowledge of Trade finance domain will be an advantage.


**What We’ll Offer You**
 As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy
   

  

* Best in class leave policy
* Gender neutral parental leaves
* 100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral)
* Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
* Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents
* Accident and Term life Insurance
* Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Demonstrably solid software engineering skills.
* As part of a high\\-performing development team, design and deliver highly functional, robust and scalable code.
* Leverage design patterns, test driven development (TDD) and behavior driven development (BDD) to build software that is reliable and easy to support in production.
* Experience of working in a team development environment as well as globally distributed project team
* Leads development of source code, including descriptions, for all software components in accordance with the detailed software requirements and design
* Hands\\-on experience of Microservices architecture, microservices development and cloud technologies would be added advantage.
* Experience in understanding enterprise data models and documenting data attribute mapping \\& interface control requirements
* Actively participate and contribute to Agile ceremonies including Daily Stand up's, Sprint Planning, Sprint review, Sprint retrospective meetings
* Strong communication, negotiation, networking and influencing skills are essential because collaboration with end\\-users, technology and operational functions are critical to the relevance of the product.
* Verifies the developed source code via reviews (4\\-eyes principle) and resolve review findings.
* Integrates software components following the groups integration strategy.
* Verifies integrated software components by unit and integrated software testing according to the software test plan. Software test findings must be resolved.
* Ensures all code changes are tracked and recorded through the groups change management process as Change Items (CIs) and that development is scheduled and approved.
* Provides Release Deployments on non\\-Production Management controlled environments.
* Captures Build and Deployment notes, develops Software Product Deployment \\& Operating Instructions
* Manages maintenance of applications and performs technical change requests scheduled according to Release Management processes.
* Fixes software defects/bugs
* Measures and analyses code for quality
* Collaborates with Functional Analysts and QA to complete work, as required.
* Provides Level 3 support.
* Contributes to root cause/problem analysis and solution brainstorming.
* Collaborates with Functional Analysts and QA to complete work, as required.
* Create required documentation for the project.
* Recommend changes to improve established java application processes and its performance.
* Shall be ready to learn new Java technologies as per the project requirements.


**Your Skills And Experience**
* Full stack Java developer
* Hands\\-on Experience in design, architecture, source code management, continuous build, continuous integration technologies, TDD, performance improvement and profiling tools
* Hands on experience in web technologies, frameworks, and tools, for example: ReactJS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Angular, Bootstrap, Node.js
* Experience with CI/CD using Jenkins is a plus.
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, and Google Cloud Platform is a plus
* OS: Unix, Windows
* Database: Oracle (preferred), Liquibase
* Languages and Frameworks: Java, Spring Boot, Event Driven Architecture, React JS/Angular JS, J2EE, Mybatis, Hibernate, Junit, Stash, Artifactory
* Tools: Gradle, GIT, Eclipse/IntelliJ, Maven, Ant, Linux/Unix shell scripting, JMS/MQ
* Other (Plus/Advantage):
+ Knowledge of Messaging (Middleware)
+ Knowledge of Design Patterns
+ Knowledge of Trade Finance is plus
+ Knowledge or experience of C\\+\\+ but not mandatory
+ Experienced with Docker, RHEL highly preferred.
+ Experience with TDD and BDD, with hands\\-on experience with least one testing framework, e.g., Junit, Cucumber, Selenium


**Key Attributes:**
* Ability to architect/design solution for a given requirement.
* Ability to help to the team.
* Ability to write high quality code.
* Ability to solve business or production problems.
* Strong analytical skills
* Strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication skills, particularly in a multi\\-cultural environment
* Excellent team player
* Keeps pace with technical innovation.


**Experience and Education:**
* Bachelor’s Degree from an accredited college or university with a concentration in Computer Science or equivalent
* 3\\-9 years of relevant work experience
* Investment Banking experience will be advantage


**How We’ll Support You**
* Training and development to help you excel in your career
* Coaching and support from experts in your team
* A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
* A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs


**About Us And Our Teams**
 Please visit our company website for further information:
   

  

**https://www.db.com/company/company.htm**
 We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.
   

  

 Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.
   

  

 We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

title: Devops Engineer - SDE-2
description:
**Following selection criteria will be followed \\-**
* 4\\-7 YOE
* Atleast 3 years of experience in the DevOps/Platform Engineering Role
* Comfortable with WFO in Noida
* Can join within 15 days


**About Us**
 SiteRecon is a B2B SaaS platform transforming property measurements for landscapers and snow removal contractors in the $176B US market. Using advanced AI on high\\-resolution aerial imagery, we’ve reduced measurement time from 1 week to 1 day, aiming for 1 hour with upcoming AI advancements.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We're looking for our founding Platform Engineer to build our infrastructure from the ground up. This isn't about maintaining existing systems \\- it's about architecting the foundation that will scale from thousands to millions of property measurements.
   

  

 As our first dedicated Platform Engineer, you'll have the rare opportunity to make architectural decisions that will impact the company for years to come. You'll transform our current infrastructure into a world\\-class platform that balances the speed of a startup with the security standards of an enterprise.
   

  

 You'll work directly with our CTO and engineering leadership to define our infrastructure philosophy. Every decision you make \\- from our CI/CD pipeline to our security architecture \\- will set the standard for how we build and ship software. This is a role for someone who wants to own outcomes, not just execute tasks.
   

  

**What Makes This Different**
* Greenfield Opportunity: Design our platform architecture from first principles, making technology choices that will define our engineering culture
* Direct Impact: Your work directly affects every engineer's productivity and our ability to serve customers. When you improve deployment time by 50%, everyone feels it
* Full Ownership: Own the entire platform stack \\- from infrastructure to developer tools. No bureaucracy, no legacy systems, just building the right thing
* Shape Engineering Culture: Define how we approach security, reliability, and developer experience. Your practices become our standards


**Key Responsibilities**
* Foundation Building
* Architect our cloud platform on GCP from scratch, making crucial decisions on everything from network topology to data encryption strategies
* Design and implement our first proper CI/CD pipeline that takes us from 30\\-minute deployments to sub\\-5 minute deployments
* Build our infrastructure\\-as\\-code foundation using Terraform, establishing patterns that will be used for years
* Security \\& Compliance Architecture
* Lead our SOC2 compliance journey by building security into every layer of our infrastructure
* Implement customer\\-managed encryption and zero\\-trust networking as foundational principles, not afterthoughts
* Create automated security scanning and remediation systems that make compliance invisible to developers
* Developer Platform Creation
* Build the self\\-service platform that lets developers provision infrastructure in minutes, not days
* Create golden paths that make the secure, scalable choice the default choice
* Design observability systems that give developers superpowers in production
* Scale Preparation
* Architect systems that can handle 100x growth without major rewrites
* Build cost optimization into our DNA \\- making smart resource decisions early
* Create disaster recovery and backup systems before we need them


**You're Right For This If You**
* Want to be "the DevOps person" everyone comes to, not just another engineer on the team
* Get excited about making architectural decisions that will matter for years
* Believe infrastructure should be invisible when it works and helpful when it doesn't
* Can balance startup speed with enterprise reliability
* Want to build the platform you wish you had at your last company


 What You'll Build in Year One
   

  

* Complete infrastructure migration to Infrastructure\\-as\\-Code
* Sub\\-5 minute deployments with automatic rollbacks
* 99\\.9% uptime with comprehensive monitoring
* Full SOC2 compliance with automated controls
* Self\\-service platform used by every engineer daily
* 50% reduction in infrastructure costs through optimization


 Technical Requirements
   

  

* Deep expertise with GCP services and cloud architecture
* Strong experience with Terraform, Kubernetes, and container orchestration
* Proficiency in Go or Python for automation
* Understanding of security best practices and compliance frameworks
* Track record of building platforms that scale


**Why This Role Matters?**
 Every hour you save our engineers is multiplied across the team. Every security issue you prevent protects thousands of customers. Every system you build becomes the foundation for our next phase of growth. This isn't just a DevOps role \\- it's a chance to define how a successful AI company builds and ships software.
   

  

 Join us as we transform an entire industry, one measurement at a time.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer I, Graise Hawkeye
job_function: Quality Assurance, Information Technology, and Engineering
description:
**Description**
 Worldwide Grocery Stores, Graise Hawkeye team is seeking a Quality Assurance Engineer. The Graise Hawkeye team is responsible for ensuring the Point of Sale (POS), SCO system is robust, reliable, and production ready. The team focuses on functional, integration, and non\\-functional testing (NFT), including performance and resilience assessments, to validate the system's quality. Comprising skilled Quality Assurance (QA) professionals and Software Development Engineer\\-Test (SDETs), the team works collaboratively to anticipate and address complex engineering and business challenges. Their responsibilities include test planning, automation, bug tracking, regression testing, and collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to ensure seamless delivery. By maintaining high testing standards and continuously improving processes, the team plays a vital role in delivering a performant and resilient POS system to meet business and customer needs.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Assist in the development and automation of functional, integration, and performance tests for an enterprise\\-class, multi\\-concept, 3\\-tier POS system.
* Contribute to maintaining and supporting test frameworks that help both QA and Dev teams in their testing efforts, ensuring smooth integration across various environments.
* Collaborate with team members on test automation strategies to improve functional, integration, and performance test coverage.
* Help automate the collection, analysis, and reporting of test results, ensuring transparency and providing useful insights to stakeholders.
* Use research and analytical skills to validate test results and help optimize testing processes for better performance and broader coverage.
* Assist in designing and implementing test scenarios and cases to replicate real\\-world conditions, ensuring comprehensive testing across QA and performance testing environments.
* Work with engineering and application teams to identify and resolve issues, fostering collaboration between QA and development teams to help improve overall product quality.
* Open to leveraging AI to enhance daily tasks, job efficiency, and test delivery. Embrace an AI\\-first approach to optimize workflows and drive faster, more accurate results.


 A day in the life
   

  

 The Graise Hawkeye Team engages in a variety of activities daily to ensure the quality, performance, and resilience of the Point of Sale (POS) system. The team focus on creating detailed test plans, developing both manual and automated test cases, and performing comprehensive functional, integration, and non\\-functional testing, including performance and scalability assessments. Collaboration with cross\\-functional teams is a cornerstone of their work, enabling them to troubleshoot issues effectively and ensure alignment on deliverables. They also manage test environments, track and resolve defects, and conduct regression testing to maintain the integrity of existing features. By analyzing test results, providing insights, and continuously improving processes, the team ensures the POS system is production\\-ready and aligned with business goals.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The Graise Hawkeye Team is dedicated to ensuring the reliability, performance, and readiness of the Point of Sale (POS) system. Our mission is to validate that every component of the POS system meets the highest standards of functionality, resilience, and production readiness.
   

  

 At the core of our team’s approach is an AI\\-first narrative, where we leverage AI\\-driven tools and automation to enhance testing efficiency and accuracy. We utilize advanced AI models to optimize functional and integration testing, as well as non\\-functional testing (NFT), enabling us to proactively identify and address complex engineering and business challenges before they affect end users.
   

  

 Our team is made up of skilled Quality Assurance (QA) professionals and Software Development Engineers in Test (SDETs) who work together to simulate real\\-world scenarios, develop AI\\-powered automated test frameworks, and ensure seamless functionality across the POS ecosystem. By integrating AI into our testing processes, we not only speed up test execution but also improve test coverage and the detection of subtle issues that may have otherwise gone unnoticed.
   

  

 With a commitment to leveraging AI\\-driven insights and advanced testing methodologies, we serve as a critical partner in delivering robust, efficient, and high\\-quality POS solutions that meet the ever\\-evolving needs of the business and its users.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 2\\+ years of quality assurance engineering experience
* Experience in automation testing
* Experience in manual testing
* Experience in UI and API automation testing (Selenium/SOAPUI)


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in API \\& Mobile testing
* Experience designing and planning test conditions, test scripts, and test data sets to ensure appropriate and adequate coverage and control

If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

description:
Staff Software Engineer – Customer Developer Tools (CDT)
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 Teradata is the connected multi\\-cloud data platform for enterprise analytics. Our enterprise analytics solve business challenges from start to scale. Only Teradata gives you the flexibility to handle the massive and mixed data workloads of the future—today.
   

  

 The Teradata Vantage architecture is cloud\\-native, delivered as\\-a\\-service, and built on an open ecosystem. These design features make Vantage the ideal platform to optimize price\\-performance in a multi\\-cloud environment.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

 As a Staff Software Engineer, you will play a technical leadership role within the Customer Developer Tools (CDT) team. You’ll design and build the next generation of high\\-performance database and AI SQL capabilities that power analytics at massive scale. You’ll work across low\\-level systems programming in C/C\\+\\+, advanced GoSQL engine enhancements, and AI\\-assisted SQL frameworks—while collaborating closely with customer developer teams to ensure seamless integration with CDT tools and Teradata’s Vantage platform.
   

  

 You will:

* Mentor engineers, lead design reviews, and drive long\\-term architectural decisions.
* Ensure high standards of performance, reliability, and maintainability across CDT and developer\\-facing tools.


 Impact and Success
   

  

 Your work will enhance the developer experience for Teradata customers, ensuring high\\-performance interoperability between Vantage and the CDT ecosystem. You’ll shape how developers and enterprises interact with Teradata data systems and accelerate innovation in AI\\-driven SQL and database capabilities.
   

  

 Success in this role means delivering measurable performance gains, driving architectural clarity, and mentoring the next generation of Teradata engineers.
   

  

 Who You’ll Work With
   

  

 You’ll join the Customer Developer Ecosystem teams. You’ll collaborate with database architects, CDT architects, engineers, and cross\\-functional platform teams. This position reports to the Director of CDT Engineering and interfaces across multiple global product teams.
   

  

 What Makes You a Qualified Candidate

* 8\\+ years of experience in systems\\-level software development or database engineering.

 What You’ll Bring
   

  

* Expertise in GoSQL, AI SQL, or related database query frameworks.

* Experience integrating with customer developer tools or SDKs.
* Familiarity with Teradata’s Vantage ecosystem or comparable enterprise data systems.
* Excellent debugging, profiling, and performance analysis skills.
* Leadership experience influencing cross\\-team architectural design and strategy.
* A passion for building scalable, reliable systems that enable global enterprise analytics.


**Why We Think You’ll Love Teradata**
 We prioritize a people\\-first culture because we know our people are at the very heart of our success. We embrace a flexible work model because we trust our people to make decisions about how, when, and where they work. We focus on well\\-being because we care about our people and their ability to thrive both personally and professionally. It is a deep commitment to doing the work to foster an equitable environment that celebrates people for all of who they are.
   

  

 Teradata invites all identities and backgrounds in the workplace. title: Staff Software Engineer - Operating Systems
description:
**Our Company**
 At Teradata, we believe that people thrive when empowered with better information. That’s why we built the most complete cloud analytics and data platform for AI. By delivering harmonized data, trusted AI, and faster innovation, we uplift and empower our customers—and our customers’ customers—to make better, more confident decisions. The world’s top companies across every major industry trust Teradata to improve business performance, enrich customer experiences, and fully integrate data across the enterprise.
   

  

**What You’ll Do:**
 In the role of Staff Software Engineer for OS Engineering team, you will be part of the Operating System Software Engineering team responsible for the development, integration, functional and performance testing of OS Level features for our public cloud and on\\-premises solutions. You will be responsible for:
   

  

* ensuring the timely delivery of committed features,
* liaising with other engineering teams for key features.


 At a broad level, you will implement software features on Teradata cloud and on\\-prem offering at the OS level. Success in this role would mean being a highly motivated, empathetic, and creative engineer who is ready to participate in an agile team environment and contribute to the success of Teradata. Given our team’s focus on solutions in the cloud in addition to the on\\-prem systems, an engineer in this role should also have experience working on projects on the Linux OS, Linux Kernel, AWS, Azure, and/or Google Cloud. Experience with Teradata Vantage is also preferred.
   

  

**Who You’ll Work With:**
 Our team is comprised of engineers working on core kernel, debugging, testing automation and validation, automated OS cloud image production, working towards the same goal: to provide comprehensive, reliable, and scalable solutions for the Teradata SQL Engine (i. e. Teradata Database) for our supported On\\-Prem and public cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud). We are looking for a candidate to join our fast paced and cutting\\-edge development organization that is on the forefront of our “Teradata Everywhere” strategy.
   

  

 Teradata Labs, the technology research and development (R\\&D) organization within Teradata Corporation, has been turning innovative decision support technology into business results for over 30 years. Our R\\&D team of analytic architects, database developers and engineers work to understand and advance emerging technologies to invent the next wave of cutting\\-edge analytic data solutions.
   

  

**What Makes You a Qualified Candidate ("Must Have"):**
* Deep understanding of Linux Kernel concepts.
* Experience with kernel crash analysis.
* Considerable experience maintaining a Linux Operating System.
* Competency in User and kernel level debugging and analysis tools in Linux (Some examples: gdb, crash, perf, network analysis tools).
* Competency in debugging issues in core OS utilities (such as rpm, curl, openssl, etc).
* Experience with public and/or private cloud environments such as Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, Linux KVM, VMWare ESXi, etc.
* Experience working with Intel\\-based x86 and/or ARM processors. Experience with both is a plus.
* Proficiency with bash, Python and C.
* Familiarity with container runtime concepts.
* Experience with complex network topology setup.
* Ability to provide assistance to our customer facing teams in customer support cases related to Linux OS escalated to engineering. Ability to provide similar support to internal development teams as well on OS issues/questions.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Meeting one of these minimum education requirements:
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related discipline with 8\\+ years of work experience.
* Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or related discipline with 6\\+ years of work experience.
* PhD in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or related discipline with 3\\+ years work experience.


**What You’ll Bring ("Good to have"):**
 As an addition to the points listed under “What makes You a Qualified Candidate”, it would be a plus to have these additional qualifications:
   

  

* Exposure to Go and Java.
* Knowledge of CIS benchmarks, FedRAMP standards, FIPS standards, STIG standards.
* Knowledge of and experience with DevOps automation tools.
* Experience with Teradata Vantage.
* Familiarity with delivery of software updates in Enterprise environments.
* Familiarity with security Best Practices.
* Familiarity with automation frameworks such as Jenkins.
* Experience working in fast paced agile scrum development environment.


**Why We Think You’ll Love Teradata**
 We prioritize a people\\-first culture because we know our people are at the very heart of our success. We embrace a flexible work model because we trust our people to make decisions about how, when, and where they work. We focus on well\\-being because we care about our people and their ability to thrive both personally and professionally. We are an anti\\-racist company because our dedication to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is more than a statement. It is a deep commitment to doing the work to foster an equitable environment that celebrates people for all of who they are.
   

  

 Teradata invites all identities and backgrounds in the workplace. We work with deliberation and intent to ensure we are cultivating collaboration and inclusivity across our global organization. ​ We are proud to be an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, color, ancestry, religion, creed, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, breastfeeding, or related conditions), national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, medical condition, genetic information, gender identity or expression, military and veteran status, or any other legally protected status.
